body_transformation: The diglett's small, burrowing silhouette remains intact with its narrow head and two clawed forelimbs extended forward. Its dull brown body now appears as smooth, translucent violet skin revealing faint internal energy currents. The soil texture is replaced with a faint, ghostly white mist clinging to its form, while the base ground effect dissolves into swirling crimson mist. The original head shape retains its elongated form but now features hollow eye sockets filled with swirling mist.
signature_feature: Hollow eye sockets: swirling crimson mist with visible internal energy currents.
